rainy_neon.sentence_fragment: neon light reflecting off the rain-slicked ground, steam rising from the wet surfaces

rainy_dim.sentence_fragment: rain streaming down in the dim light, the air thick with moisture

rainy_dark.sentence_fragment: sheets of rain in the near-darkness, water pooling on every surface

foggy_dappled.sentence_fragment: shafts of light cutting through the morning mist

foggy_cool.sentence_fragment: cold mist clinging to the ground, visibility fading into gray

cloudy_dim.sentence_fragment: diffused gray light from the overcast sky softening all edges

breezy_golden_hour.sentence_fragment: a warm breeze carrying the golden light across the scene

stormy_dark.sentence_fragment: lightning illuminating the dark sky, the air charged with electricity

snowy_night.sentence_fragment: snow falling silently in the faint glow of distant lights

neon_night.sentence_fragment: saturated neon light painting the scene in electric hues

moonlight_night.sentence_fragment: cool blue moonlight washing over the scene, casting long silver shadows

steamy_soft.sentence_fragment: steam rising and curling in the soft diffused light

fluorescent_cool.sentence_fragment: buzzing fluorescent light casting stark shadows across the space

sunny_warm.sentence_fragment: warm sunlight spilling across the scene

sunny_bright.sentence_fragment: bright sunlight streaming across every surface

sunny_golden_hour.sentence_fragment: long golden light casting warm shadows
